product_results.title: Apple iPhone 14 Pro, 256GB, Deep Purple - Unlocked (Renewed)

summary.text: Customers find the cellular phone to be in excellent condition and describe it as a good phone with excellent quality. They appreciate the phone's appearance. However, customers experience issues with sim compatibility. Opinions are mixed regarding screen protection, battery life, functionality, and the camera.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect condition - minus the battery health.
authors_reviews.text: A minor scratch on the screen protector but that doesn’t matter much, it’s a working iPhone 14 Pro. It had 87% battery health when it got here. Runs flawlessly.
authors_reviews.author: Michael Narlidis

authors_reviews.title: It was a rebuild (non-apple parts) as opposed to a refurb. It failed upon close inspection.
authors_reviews.text: Unfortunately is was more of a "rebuild" than an "referb". The camera was not the Apple original, it was glued in and had spots on the lens, under the glass. It showed up when the camera was on and you saw blotches on the phones screen. A lens that was unserviceable without taking apart the phone and hoping for the best. Seriously though, you could see the circular glue spread of the third-party lens put against the glass of the cameras lens casing.The screen had a bit of glue residue where it met the case. The case itself was stellar, but you have to look at the details over a day to see where it all falls apart. Sent back and will not try again from Amazon for such an expensive device.
authors_reviews.author: boneill

authors_reviews.title: Looks like brand new, excellent condition indeed!
authors_reviews.text: Looks amazing. Works amazing. 84 % battery capacity. Came with a charging cord and a little tool to remove the SIM Card. Set up and data transfer was easy although I am technically challenged. I decided to buy a phone in Deep Purple colour hoping it would be a better kept trade in phone -maybe from a woman ?- than the black ones are. Maybe I was just lucky ? But this phone is in like new condition and the battery is good too. I am also upgrading from 64 Gb to 512 Gb - what a difference this will be. The only point I would like to raise are the prices. They were all over the place. I bought this phone for $ 812, after I could still cancel the order from the night before ( Dec 24) for $ 850. When I showed my son my order on the evening of Dec 25, it came up with $996! So keep on checking for the very best deal.
authors_reviews.author: Claudia Sedlmeir

authors_reviews.title: Good condition minus the battery
authors_reviews.text: Order the "excellent condition phone". Physically, the phone is amazing, no scratches or dings, all the buttons and cameras work. I have one issue with some random magenta screen glitches every once in a while, but I've read that's just because of the new iOS 26.The reason I can't give 5 stars is the battery. For an excellent condition phone, I would have expected them to replace the battery. Got the phone and the battery was at 85% capacity so I'm going to have to pay an extra $100+ to get my battery replaced at Apple.I've gotten a renewed MacBook from another seller in the past, and the battery was 100% capacity when I got it, and still is almost a year later.EDIT: Also, a minor complaint, but I thought the cable that was supposed to come in the box (based on other reviews) was a USB-C to lightning, but the one I got was a regular USB-A to lightning, AND they didn't send a SIM-card ejector. I was lucky I still had my old one
authors_reviews.author: Tina Cerqueira

authors_reviews.title: iPhone 14pro refurb
authors_reviews.text: I don't do reviews, however I thought it was important for anyone buying a refurnished iphone. Had 3 tiny marks along the edges, which is covered by the case and no other issues.Am really happy with the phone. No issues at all.
authors_reviews.author: Jelena

authors_reviews.title: Battery faulty
authors_reviews.text: great phone but batterie runs low Fast haven't had it for a month its not a all bad phone but the battery is the only problem it will be at 100% from 8AM AND before 12 pm it would be already low
authors_reviews.author: Brandy He/They.

authors_reviews.title: Great phone
authors_reviews.text: Phone arrived in nice packaging, device was in beautiful condition with 96% battery health, very happy with this purchase.
authors_reviews.author: JS

authors_reviews.title: Bought excellent in a good condition?
authors_reviews.text: Bought an excellent condition, and im not really satisfied with the 83% battery health and scratches 😔
authors_reviews.author: Ish
